title: fumaria coccinea
intro: Fumaria coccinea, also known as red fumitory, is a flowering plant species in the genus Fumaria. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Fumaria coccinea include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Fumaria coccinea can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
